room.caption: [G6-FireF] DLC is required to view the dudes, though. Sorry, ladies, and other dude enthusiasts.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=1872 newMapY=240 toRoom=rGame6_FireE depth=9
